query: I have two duplicate contacts for the same customer - IDs 42 and 87. The one with ID 42 has more data. How do I merge them?
expected_behavior: Recommends contacts_merge with base_contact_id: 42 and mergee_contact_id: 87
Explains that base_contact survives and mergee is deleted
Notes that conversations from mergee transfer to base
Suggests verifying with contacts_get on both IDs first

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May not know about the contacts_merge tool or the base vs mergee distinction

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct merge call with clear explanation of base vs mergee

query: I need to find all contacts that have an email from @acme.com domain who haven't been active in 90 days. What's the best approach?
expected_behavior: Uses contacts_filter (not contacts_search) for structured query
Shows correct payload with email contains '@acme.com' AND last_activity_at days_before 90
Gets the query_operator right (AND on first condition, null on last)
Explains why contacts_filter is better than contacts_search for this use case

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May use contacts_search which doesn't support date and boolean conditions

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correct multi-condition filter with proper operators

query: I want to tag all contacts from a specific domain as 'enterprise' but I don't want to lose their existing labels. How?
expected_behavior: Warns that contact_labels_set replaces all labels
Shows the read-merge-write pattern for each contact
Uses contacts_filter to find domain contacts

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May directly set labels without knowing about the replace behavior

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - correctly handles label replacement with safe merge pattern

query: I want to create a new contact and start a conversation with them on our email inbox. What's the process?
expected_behavior: Links to inbox with contacts_create_contact_inbox or uses contactable_inboxes
Creates conversation with conversations_create using contact_id and inbox_id
Shows the complete workflow from contact creation to conversation

baseline_without_skill.likely_response: May not know about the contact-inbox relationship requirement

with_skill_expected.response_quality: High - complete workflow covering contact-inbox linking and conversation creation
